rationale: Re-assert each run's `forall|lo,hi|` gap-ensures so z3 instantiates both quantifiers on aligned skolems; then transitivity through `pre_self_@.insert(k,v)` gives `post1_self_@ == post2_self_@`, and the two forall bodies share an RHS so `gap` is pointwise equivalent — together these are exactly what `det_set_equal` needs.
